_comment: Completed 2026 FIFA World Cup group-stage results. Update this file as matches are played - team names must match scripts/sim/countryMap.js / tournament.js group rosters exactly. Each entry's Elo is updated via scripts/sim/eloUpdate.js (eloratings.net methodology, K=60) before the next simulation run, and the fixture itself is excluded from the group simulation in favour of the actual scoreline.
